acquisition method: Parallel reaction monitoring was used to confirm the reliability of the proteomic analysis.
cleavage agent: digested using trypsin (Promega, United States) in a ratio of protein:trypsin at 50:1.
instrument: Mass spectrometry analysis was performed using Q Exactive HF (Thermo Fisher Scientific, United States).
labeling: label-free quantification proteomic analysis of the hepatopancreas.
